title: LeadPhysics
description: Physical lead simulation with configurable rendering and collisions. Not changes vanilla lead physics.
body:
# LeadPhysics

LeadPhysics replaces the stiff vanilla leash look with a smoother physical rope simulation while keeping the mod lightweight and client-side.

### MOD NOT CHANGE VANILLA PHYSICS OF VANILLA LEAD !!!

## Features

- Physical rope simulation instead of a rigid vanilla line
- Configurable 2D and 3D lead rendering
- Adjustable physics strength
- Optional block collision
- Client-side configuration through Mod Menu
- Vanilla lead logic stays intact

## Configuration

LeadPhysics includes an in-game config screen where you can change:

- Enable or disable the mod
- Render mode: 2D or 3D
- Physics strength
- Block collision

## Compatibility

- Fabric
- Client-side
- Mod Menu supported

Available port branches and builds:

- `1.21.9`
- `1.21.10`
- `1.21.11`
- `26.1`

## Links

- Modrinth: https://modrinth.com/project/leadphysics
- CurseForge: https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/leadphysics
